_schema: Player-facing UI strings. Director-authored, verbatim (CLAUDE.md law 6). weather_today = Old School's observation of the CURRENT weather, picked by day. weather_cues = his gut about TOMORROW — only exists for weather worth sensing; empty means the gut is quiet, which is information too.

clear: Days like this make you think you've got farming figured out.
Sun's out and everybody's suddenly brave.
Good weather makes optimists out of all of us.
Wouldn't waste a day like this sitting inside.
overcast: Clouds are hanging around but don't seem committed.
Feels like weather that's still making up its mind.
That's half of farming right there.
rain_light: Rain's got manners today. Enough to settle the dust without changing anybody's plans.
Good rain. The kind folks quit talking about after ten minutes.
Fields'll appreciate it more than people will.
storm: Sky's serious today. Best make sure you've tied down what matters.
Storm's coming with purpose. County's about to get busy.
Some weather asks politely. This kind just shows up.
drought: Crops can handle a lot, but they still notice days like this.
By supper you'll know exactly how much water you've got.
wind: Makes a man wonder what he forgot to tie down.
Flag's been standing straight out since breakfast.
Some days you hear the county before you see it.
Hay likes a breeze. Tin roofs don't.
fog: Fog settled in thick this morning.
County feels smaller when you can't see past the next field.
Road'll still be there once the sun burns through.
Good day to take things slower.
Everything looks borrowed until the fog gives it back.

storm: Feels like rain that'll stay awhile.
Old folks would already be moving equipment inside.
